channel.title: Topic 1 on Baberg.nu
channel.description: Recent content in Topic 1 on Baberg.nu

item.title: Push?
item.description: Sometimes the updates you do do not work, and one question is - whose fault is it? This post is to see if the last post had issues due to filename length or something else.

item.title: Make it happen
item.description: This webpage has been created using Hugo, a static website generator. For hosting the page I’m using Bitbucket, together with Aerobatic for being able to update the page through a simple git push. Hugo Bitbucket Aerobatic

item.title: It's alive
item.description: I’ve just set up this new webpage, where I’ll try to post interesting ideas and things I find.
